sentences.target: Je compare les prix en ligne.

translations.fr: Je compare les prix en ligne.
translations.vi: Tôi so sánh giá trên mạng.
translations.hi: मैं ऑनलाइन कीमतों की तुलना करता हूँ।
translations.ja: オンラインで価格を比較します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; core subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular) expressing the action of comparing.
Definite article, plural; determines the noun 'prix'.
Common noun; direct object of 'compare'. Form is syncretic for singular/plural; here plural.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Noun complement of 'en' forming the set phrase 'en ligne' (online), functioning as an adverbial.

sentences.target: Nous comparons les photos avant d’imprimer.

translations.fr: Nous comparons les photos avant d’imprimer.
translations.en: We compare the photos before printing.
translations.es: Comparamos las fotos antes de imprimir.
translations.de: Wir vergleichen die Fotos, bevor wir sie drucken.
translations.it: Confrontiamo le foto prima di stamparle.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在打印前比较照片。
translations.yue: 我哋喺打印之前比較相片。
translations.pt: Comparamos as fotos antes de imprimir.
translations.he: אנחנו משווים את התמונות לפני ההדפסה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi so sánh ảnh trước khi in.
translations.nl: We vergelijken de foto's voordat we ze afdrukken.
translations.hi: हम छापने से पहले फ़ोटो की तुलना करते हैं।
translations.el: Συγκρίνουμε τις φωτογραφίες πριν από την εκτύπωση.
translations.nb: Vi sammenligner bildene før vi skriver dem ut.
translations.sv: Vi jämför fotona innan vi skriver ut dem.
translations.da: Vi sammenligner billederne, før vi udskriver dem.
translations.ja: 印刷する前に写真を比較します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun; core subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person plural); action of comparing.
Definite article, plural; determines the noun 'photos'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'comparons'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement ('avant de' + infinitive).
Elided form of the preposition 'de' before a vowel; part of the fixed sequence 'avant de' linking to an infinitive.
Infinitive verb governed by 'avant de'; expresses the action that will occur later.

sentences.target: Elle compare ses notes à celles de Paul.
sentences.reading: /ɛl kɔ̃paʁ se nɔt a sɛl də pɔl/

translations.fr: Elle compare ses notes à celles de Paul.
translations.ipa: /ɛl kɔ̃paʁ se nɔt a sɛl də pɔl/
translations.en: She compares her notes to Paul’s.
translations.es: Ella compara sus apuntes con los de Paul.
translations.de: Sie vergleicht ihre Notizen mit denen von Paul.
translations.it: Confronta i suoi appunti con quelli di Paul.
translations.ko: 그녀는 자신의 필기와 폴의 필기를 비교해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她把自己的笔记和保罗的笔记进行比较。
translations.yue: 佢將自己嘅筆記同保羅嘅筆記作比較。
translations.ru: Она сравнивает свои записи с записями Пола.
translations.pt: Ela compara suas anotações com as de Paul.
translations.he: היא משווה את הסיכומים שלה לאלה של פול.
translations.vi: Cô ấy so sánh ghi chú của mình với của Paul.
translations.nl: Ze vergelijkt haar aantekeningen met die van Paul.
translations.uk: Вона порівнює свої нотатки з нотатками Пола.
translations.hi: वह अपने नोट्स की तुलना पॉल के नोट्स से करती है।
translations.pl: Ona porównuje swoje notatki z notatkami Paula.
translations.el: Συγκρίνει τις σημειώσεις της με τις σημειώσεις του Paul.
translations.nb: Hun sammenligner notatene sine μεd Pauls.
translations.id: Dia membandingkan catatannya dengan catatan Paul.
translations.sv: Hon jämför sina anteckningar med Pauls.
translations.ro: Ea își compară notițele cu cele ale lui Paul.
translations.cs: Porovnává své poznámky s poznámkami Paula.
translations.da: Hun sammenligner sine noter med Pauls.
translations.ja: 彼女は自分のノートをポールのものと比べます。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine subject pronoun; core subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); action of comparing.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular possessor) agreeing with plural noun 'notes'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'compare'.
Preposition marking the term of comparison with 'comparer ... à ...'.
Demonstrative pronoun (feminine plural) referring to previously known items (here, implied 'notes'); object of 'à'.
Preposition expressing possession or origin; links 'celles' to 'Paul'.
Proper noun; complement of 'de' indicating the possessor.

sentences.target: Tu peux comparer ces deux modèles.

translations.fr: Tu peux comparer ces deux modèles.
translations.en: You can compare these two models.
translations.de: Du kannst diese beiden Modelle vergleichen.
translations.ko: 이 두 모델을 비교할 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以比较这两个型号。
translations.yue: 你可以比較呢兩個型號。
translations.ru: Ты можешь сравнить эти две модели.
translations.pt: Você pode comparar estes dois modelos.
translations.he: אתה יכול להשוות בין שני הדגמים האלה.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể so sánh hai mẫu này.
translations.nl: Je kunt deze twee modellen vergelijken.
translations.uk: Ти можеш порівняти ці дві моделі.
translations.hu: Össze tudod hasonlítani ezt a két modellt.
translations.hi: तुम इन दो मॉडलों की तुलना कर सकते हो।
translations.el: Μπορείς να συγκρίνεις αυτά τα δύο μοντέλα.
translations.nb: Du kan sammenligne disse to modellene.
translations.id: Kamu bisa membandingkan dua model ini.
translations.sv: Du kan jämföra de här δύο modellerna.
translations.da: Du kan sammenligne disse to modeller.
translations.ja: この二つのモデルを比較できます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; core subject of the clause.
Modal verb in present indicative (2nd person singular); expresses ability/permission and governs an infinitive.
Infinitive verb complement of the modal 'peux'; denotes the main lexical action.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies 'modèles'.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies 'modèles'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'comparer'.

Tu peux comparer ces deux modèles.
